remember: Students will be able to recall the events and factors that led to the decline of the Congress System in India.
Students will be able to identify the key players and their roles in the collapse of the Congress System.
Students will be able to list the major challenges faced by the Congress System in India.
understand: Students will be able to explain the significance of the Congress System in India's political history.
Students will be able to analyze the reasons behind the decline of the Congress System in India.
Students will be able to describe the impact of the decline of the Congress System on Indian politics.
apply: Students will be able to apply the concepts of the Congress System to understand contemporary Indian politics.
Students will be able to use the lessons from the Congress System to evaluate the effectiveness of modern political parties in India.
analyze: Students will be able to critically evaluate the strengths and weaknesses of the Congress System.
Students will be able to compare the Congress System with other political systems in India to identify its unique features.
Students will be able to analyze the implications of the decline of the Congress System for the future of Indian democracy.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: To understand the factors that led to the decline of the Congress System in India.
As per NCERT objective 2: To analyze the impact of the decline of the Congress System on Indian politics.
board_exam_objectives: To describe the collapse of the Congress System and its consequences for Indian politics.
To explain the reasons behind the decline of the Congress System and its implications for the future of Indian democracy.
